stories.title: Our way-too-early look at the NFL season: Biggest ...
stories.summary: The NFL season is 100 days away. Let's celebrate with 100 things to know, including bold predictions, fantasy sleepers and injury buzz.

stories.title: Serena making comeback to professional tennis
stories.summary: Serena Williams, 44, is making her comeback to pro tennis after nearly four years as she is scheduled to play doubles next week at the HSBC Championships in London.

stories.title: Sources: WR-needy Giants work out OBJ again
stories.summary: The Giants are working out Odell Beckham Jr. for a second time this offseason as they contemplate a reunion with the former star wide receiver, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: HOF receiver, ex-coach Raymond Berry dies at 93
stories.summary: Raymond Berry, a Hall of Fame receiver with the Baltimore Colts who led the NFL in catches three times and who later coached the Patriots, has died at the age of 93.

stories.title: Harper on labor talks: 'Can't lose that momentum'
stories.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper expressed concern over what could happen to the sport if the 2027 season is compromised because of a lockout.
